queries.natural_language: List Sector, Is_Profitable (boolean), Change_in_Rank from fortune500_companies where Sector equals 'Retailing'.
queries.sql: SELECT "sector", "is_profitable_boolean", "change_in_rank" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("sector" = 'Retailing');

queries.natural_language: List Sector, ProfitsPercentChange, MarketCap_Updated_M from fortune500_companies where Sector equals 'Health Care'.
queries.sql: SELECT "sector", "profits_percent_change", "market_cap_updated_m" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("sector" = 'Health Care');

queries.natural_language: List Sector, ProfitsPercentChange, Industry from fortune500_companies where Sector contains 'care'.
queries.sql: SELECT "sector", "profits_percent_change", "industry" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%care%');

queries.natural_language: Find Sector, Change_in_Rank, HeadquartersState from fortune500_companies where Sector contains 'care' and Sector contains 'health'.
queries.sql: SELECT "sector", "change_in_rank", "headquarters_state" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%care%') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%health%');

queries.natural_language: Find Sector, Company, Best_Companies_to_Work_For (boolean) from fortune500_companies where Sector equals 'Health Care' and Sector contains 'health'.
queries.sql: SELECT "sector", "company", "best_companies_to_work_for_boolean" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("sector" = 'Health Care') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%health%');

queries.natural_language: Find HeadquartersCity, row_id, Gained_in_Rank from fortune500_companies where HeadquartersCity equals 'New York' and HeadquartersCity contains 'york'.
queries.sql: SELECT "headquarters_city", "row_id", "gained_in_rank" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("headquarters_city" = 'New York') AND (LOWER(CAST("headquarters_city" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%york%');

queries.natural_language: Find HeadquartersState, ProfitsPercentChange, Company from fortune500_companies where HeadquartersState equals 'Illinois' and HeadquartersState contains 'illinois'.
queries.sql: SELECT "headquarters_state", "profits_percent_change", "company" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("headquarters_state" = 'Illinois') AND (LOWER(CAST("headquarters_state" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%illinois%');

queries.natural_language: Find CompanyType, Number_of_employees (integer), Country from fortune500_companies where CompanyType equals 'Private' and CompanyType contains 'private'.
queries.sql: SELECT "company_type", "number_of_employees_integer", "country" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("company_type" = 'Private') AND (LOWER(CAST("company_type" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%private%');

queries.natural_language: Find HeadquartersState, MarketCap_March28_M, Rank (integer) from fortune500_companies where HeadquartersState equals 'Ohio' and HeadquartersState contains 'ohio'.
queries.sql: SELECT "headquarters_state", "market_cap_march28_m", "rank_integer" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("headquarters_state" = 'Ohio') AND (LOWER(CAST("headquarters_state" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%ohio%');

queries.natural_language: Find Sector, Ticker, Global500 from fortune500_companies where Sector equals 'Food, Beverages & Tobacco' and Sector contains 'food'.
queries.sql: SELECT "sector", "ticker", "global500" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("sector" = 'Food, Beverages & Tobacco') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%food%');

queries.natural_language: Find Industry, Is_Profitable (boolean), Worlds_Most_Admired_Companies from fortune500_companies where Industry equals 'Food Consumer Products', Industry contains 'consumer', and Sector contains 'food'.
queries.sql: SELECT "industry", "is_profitable_boolean", "worlds_most_admired_companies" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("industry" = 'Food Consumer Products') AND (LOWER(CAST("industry" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%consumer%') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%food%');

queries.natural_language: Find Industry, Newcomer_to_the_Fortune500, Revenues_M from fortune500_companies where Industry contains 'motor', Sector contains 'parts', and Sector contains 'vehicles'.
queries.sql: SELECT "industry", "newcomer_to_the_fortune500", "revenues_m" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("industry" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%motor%') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%parts%') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%vehicles%');

queries.natural_language: Find Sector, CompanyType, Newcomer_to_the_Fortune500 from fortune500_companies where Sector contains 'wholesalers', Industry contains 'wholesalers', and Industry contains 'diversified'.
queries.sql: SELECT "sector", "company_type", "newcomer_to_the_fortune500" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%wholesalers%') AND (LOWER(CAST("industry" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%wholesalers%') AND (LOWER(CAST("industry" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%diversified%');

queries.natural_language: Find Industry, Worlds_Most_Admired_Companies, Newcomer_to_the_Fortune500 from fortune500_companies where Industry equals 'Motor Vehicles & Parts', Sector contains 'motor', and Sector contains 'vehicles'.
queries.sql: SELECT "industry", "worlds_most_admired_companies", "newcomer_to_the_fortune500" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE ("industry" = 'Motor Vehicles & Parts') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%motor%') AND (LOWER(CAST("sector" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%vehicles%');
